entries.description: Pre-pandemic record-low unemployment, wage growth for lower-income workers, and reduced poverty-related health impacts through economic policies
entries.causation_evidence: BLS employment and wage data, health economics correlations with poverty reduction

entries.description: U.S. energy independence achievements, lower energy costs, and reduced energy poverty for vulnerable households
entries.causation_evidence: EIA data on production/export milestones and fuel poverty studies

entries.description: Significant decline in national homicide and violent crime rates, reaching historic lows in major cities
entries.causation_evidence: FBI UCR data, Council on Criminal Justice reports showing record drops

entries.description: Border security measures and enforcement linked to sharp reductions in fentanyl/opioid overdose deaths
entries.causation_evidence: CDC provisional data showing 20-27% drops in overdose fatalities, CBP/DEA seizure trends

entries.description: Skepticism toward prolonged foreign military interventions, contributing to fewer U.S. troop casualties in certain periods
entries.causation_evidence: DoD casualty records and policy comparisons

entries.description: Environmental deregulation and expanded fossil fuel policies leading to modeled increases in air pollution and climate-related health impacts
entries.causation_evidence: EPA models, independent analyses projecting excess premature deaths from emissions

entries.description: Associations with public health policy responses during the COVID-19 pandemic and debates over excess mortality impacts
entries.causation_evidence: CDC life expectancy data, various epidemiological reviews

entries.description: Increased societal polarization, rhetoric-linked stress, and reported rises in certain hate incidents or political violence
entries.causation_evidence: FBI hate crime statistics, studies on political violence trends

entries.description: Events surrounding January 6 Capitol riot, including direct harms and longer-term institutional trust erosion
Trade tariffs and policy disruptions causing short-term economic impacts on certain industries and workers
entries.causation_evidence: Economic analyses of tariff effects on employment and supply chains

entries.description: Emphasis on law-and-order and criminal justice priorities contributing to ongoing public safety improvements
Broader cultural and policy alignments criticized for exacerbating divisions or affecting mental health and social cohesion
entries.causation_evidence: Sociological and public health studies on polarization
